London Bakery Site Selection
■ Green (tall) — High-confidence recommendations
■ Faint green — Borderline recommendations
■ Bright red — Best co-location spots (high demand)
■ Faded red — Existing bakerys (lower opportunity)
■ Orange — Model blind spots
■ Purple (medium) — Expansion opportunity (room for another)
Height = model confidence | Taller = stronger recommendation
Threshold: F1-optimal | Hover for full stats
